div.class: o-mail-DiscussSearch-inputContainer h-100 border border-secondary position-relative d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center gap-1 flex-grow-1 rounded-2

input.class: form-control rounded-2 border-0 bg-inherit ps-0 lh-1

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-muted p-1 o-me-0_5 position-absolute top-50 end-0 translate-middle-y
button.title: Clear search
